originalTitle: Reinforcement learning & chill. Working on experiments + talks
title: Analyzing Carb Sweep Results and Investigating Sticky Actions in Atari
summary: Worked on hyperparameter sweeps for MoBA and Pong, debugged the shape of the carb sweep curves, and investigated a potential issue with the sticky actions wrapper from the Machado paper, which may hinder performance on long-horizon games like Pong. Planned a confirmatory experiment and continued storyboarding a talk on reinforcement learning infrastructure problems.
